title: Alexbrine
description: Adds a Herobrine-adjacent anomaly to watch over you (No Resource Pack Required)
body:
This datapack adds Alexbrine, a spooky entity who will stalk the player through their playthrough.
Keep a respectful distance and she'll probably leave you alone.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler!</summary>
Alexbrine has a chance to become aggresive if the player stays in her vicinity for too long. She prefers to lurk in villages and may attack nearby iron golems.
</details>



![Alexbrine chillin'.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0d9d7c442f06bb50d28773d7a420a394c7fc6ac.png)

*No resourcepack required for this addon, but make sure you have an internet connection or Alexbrine's appearance will revert to Alex.*
